query:
SELECT 
  id,
  salesPerson,
  customerName,
  classDate,
  courseName,
  teacher,
  city,
  LENGTH(notes) as notes_length,
  SUBSTRING(notes, 1, 300) as notes_preview
FROM orders
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-01-14 14:56:00'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
